detectors.description:
HunderedTrillion.sendETHToFee(uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#747-753) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (HunderedTrillion.sol#749)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (HunderedTrillion.sol#751)

[HunderedTrillion.sendETHToFee(uint256)](HunderedTrillion.sol#L747-L753) sends eth to arbitrary user

	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10))](HunderedTrillion.sol#L751)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HunderedTrillion.openTrading() (HunderedTrillion.sol#757-805):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (HunderedTrillion.sol#769-771)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HunderedTrillion.sol#773-787)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HunderedTrillion.sol#773-787)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (HunderedTrillion.sol#795)
	HunderedTrillion.tradingOpen (HunderedTrillion.sol#359) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HunderedTrillion.openTrading() (HunderedTrillion.sol#757-805)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HunderedTrillion._transfer(address,address,uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#613-715):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (HunderedTrillion.sol#687)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (HunderedTrillion.sol#729-741)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (HunderedTrillion.sol#693)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (HunderedTrillion.sol#749)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (HunderedTrillion.sol#751)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (HunderedTrillion.sol#713)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (HunderedTrillion.sol#921)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (HunderedTrillion.sol#901)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (HunderedTrillion.sol#903)
	HunderedTrillion._rOwned (HunderedTrillion.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HunderedTrillion._takeTeam(uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#915-923)
	- HunderedTrillion._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#875-911)
	- HunderedTrillion.balanceOf(address) (HunderedTrillion.sol#439-443)
	- HunderedTrillion.constructor(address,address) (HunderedTrillion.sol#385-403)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (HunderedTrillion.sol#713)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (HunderedTrillion.sol#929)
	HunderedTrillion._rTotal (HunderedTrillion.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HunderedTrillion._getCurrentSupply() (HunderedTrillion.sol#1071-1081)
	- HunderedTrillion._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#927-933)
	- HunderedTrillion.constructor(address,address) (HunderedTrillion.sol#385-403)
	- HunderedTrillion.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (HunderedTrillion.sol#543-565)
